description_short: AI-enhanced PCAP analysis with Condition Orange support.
description_long: Wraps all static PCAP analysis and threat hunt tools with LLM intelligence. Provides three analysis tiers: triage (SOC Tier 1/2 prioritization and C2 beacon hunting), threat hunt (MITRE ATT&CK mapping, hypothesis generation, evidence gathering), and reporting (executive summary, IOC extraction, shift handover). Supports Condition Orange mode for heightened alert investigations where false negatives are more costly than false positives. If a markdown or text file is loaded in the session (via 'load notes.md'), its content is automatically injected into the prompt as INVESTIGATION CONTEXT.
author: Event Mill Contributors
